The '''EWHB-10''' was an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]] produced by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]] It was designed to be carried and operated by two [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], and had a set-up time of fifteen [[Standard minute/Legends|minutes]]. It was possible to carry the weapon with the tripod attached, but it was not a recommended maneuver. Power for the weapon came from an [[Eksoan/Legends|Eksoan]] [[Class-4T3 power generator/Legends|Class-4T3 power generator]] with a [[Gk3 Cryocooler]], while targeting fire control was provided by [[Starvision]] and [[Infrared/Legends|IR]] for operation at night and in adverse environmental conditions. Built in communications allowed the crew of the E-Web to communicate with other E-Web units in case central communications was disrupted.
